description: Style NoteIf you're looking for a sport-inspired, casual tee which won't let you down in either style or performance, then your search is over! This T-shirt from nike has an off duty approach, just what you need to perfect your effortlessly fashionable casual look.Product DetailsGrey striped T-shirt, has a polo neck with two button placket, short sleeves, brand tag at the hem, embroidery on left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitRegular fit
